name: Delinquency Escalation Ladder
description: Normalize a delinquency account, stage reminder and escalation artifacts, gate resident/legal/owner actions, and track resolution without external sends or AppFolio writes.

stages.name: Normalize Delinquency Case
stages.description: Convert the Lane 0 delinquency trigger into a HubKey workflow case record.

steps.title: Normalize delinquency account
steps.instructions: Normalize receivable_external_id, tenant/property/unit refs, delinquent_rent_cents, amount_receivable_cents, as_of_date, and any payment plan or dispute flags into a delinquency account case. Do not write to AppFolio.
steps.dispatch_body: Create an internal delinquency account case from the Lane 0 trigger fields. No external sends and no AppFolio writes.

stages.name: Review Exceptions
stages.description: Identify and resolve data, dispute, and payment-plan exceptions before outreach is drafted.

steps.title: Review delinquency exceptions
steps.instructions: Review missing tenant/property/unit refs, disputed balances, active payment plans, duplicate receivables, or stale as_of_date values before escalation continues.
steps.human_prompt: Review delinquency account exceptions before resident-facing drafts are prepared.

stages.name: Draft Resident Reminder
stages.description: Prepare a neutral reminder draft for review only.

steps.title: Draft resident reminder
steps.instructions: Draft a resident reminder using normalized amount, rent-only delinquency context, due/as-of dates, and payment/dispute indicators. Keep it staged as an internal draft only; do not send externally.
steps.dispatch_body: Draft the resident reminder for approval. Do not send or queue outbound delivery.

stages.name: Resident Approval Gate
stages.description: Require human approval before any resident-facing reminder can leave the system.

steps.title: Approve resident reminder
steps.instructions: Approve, edit, hold, or reject the resident reminder draft. This SOP does not perform external sends.
steps.human_prompt: Approval required before any delinquency reminder is sent outside HubKey.

stages.name: Stage Late Fee And Notice
stages.description: Prepare accounting and formal-notice artifacts for later gated action.

steps.title: Stage late fee and formal notice
steps.instructions: Stage late-fee eligibility notes, formal notice checklist, balance basis, and timing checkpoints for review. Do not post fees, generate legal service, send notices, or write to AppFolio.
steps.dispatch_title: Stage delinquency late fee and formal notice
steps.dispatch_body: Prepare internal late-fee and formal-notice staging notes only. No external sends and no AppFolio writes.

stages.name: Owner And Human Gate
stages.description: Prepare owner status context when escalation requires it, then hold for human direction.

steps.title: Prepare owner escalation status
steps.instructions: Prepare owner-status context only when owner escalation is required: resident, property, balance, timeline, exception flags, proposed next step, and legal-risk notes. Do not contact the owner.
steps.dispatch_body: Prepare owner escalation status context for human review. No outbound owner contact.

steps.title: Owner and legal escalation gate
steps.instructions: Decide whether to hold, continue reminders, request owner direction, stage formal notice, or prepare eviction handoff. Legal escalation and owner contact remain human-gated.
steps.human_prompt: Human decision required before owner escalation, formal notice release, or eviction handoff.

stages.name: Prepare Eviction Handoff Packet
stages.description: Assemble a legal handoff packet without filing, sending, or legal-action execution.

steps.title: Assemble eviction handoff packet
steps.instructions: Assemble an internal handoff packet with ledger basis, receivable_external_id, resident/property/unit refs, notice timeline, payment plan/dispute flags, approval history, and open questions. Do not file, send, or write to AppFolio.
steps.dispatch_body: Prepare internal eviction handoff packet only. No legal filing, external send, or AppFolio write.

steps.title: Legal handoff gate
steps.instructions: Approve, hold, or reject the handoff packet before any legal escalation occurs. This SOP stops at internal handoff readiness.
steps.human_prompt: Human approval required before any eviction or legal handoff action.

stages.name: Track Resolution
stages.description: Record the final delinquency state and next monitoring checkpoint.

steps.title: Track delinquency resolution
steps.instructions: Track paid, payment-plan, dispute, notice-staged, legal-handoff-ready, or write-off/hold outcomes with source, timestamp, amount, and next checkpoint. Record workflow state only; do not write to AppFolio.
steps.dispatch_body: Record the internal delinquency resolution state and next checkpoint. No external sends and no AppFolio writes.
